import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    PYRAMID = 5
    SQUARE = 4
    YELLOW = 5
    GREEN = 2

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)])

    def find_obj(grid, tile_id, color_id):
        mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == tile_id) & (grid[:, :, 1] == color_id)
        count = jnp.sum(mask).astype(jnp.float32)
        y = jnp.sum(yy * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        x = jnp.sum(xx * mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count, 1.0)
        return y, x, count

    # State info
    pyr_y_s, pyr_x_s, pyr_cnt_s = find_obj(state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_s, sq_x_s, _ = find_obj(state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_s = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_s = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_s = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    pyr_y_n, pyr_x_n, pyr_cnt_n = find_obj(next_state.grid, PYRAMID, YELLOW)
    sq_y_n, sq_x_n, _ = find_obj(next_state.grid, SQUARE, GREEN)
    ay_n = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    ax_n = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_n = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == YELLOW)

    pyr_on_grid_n = pyr_cnt_n > 0.5
    just_picked = (~holding_s) & holding_n
    just_placed = holding_s & (~holding_n)

    hs = holding_s.astype(jnp.float32)
    hn = holding_n.astype(jnp.float32)

    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    # Success: pyramid on grid, not held, Manhattan dist == 1 to square
    dist_pyr_sq_n = jnp.abs(pyr_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_n - sq_x_n)
    dist_pyr_sq_s = jnp.abs(pyr_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(pyr_x_s - sq_x_s)
    success = pyr_on_grid_n & (~holding_n) & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)

    # Front cell in next state
    dir_n = next_state.agent.direction
    fdy_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    fdx_n = DIRECTIONS[dir_n, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_n = jnp.clip(ay_n + fdy_n, 0.0, jnp.float32(H - 1))
    front_x_n = jnp.clip(ax_n + fdx_n, 0.0, jnp.float32(W - 1))

    # Front cell in prev state
    dir_s = state.agent.direction
    fdy_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 0].astype(jnp.float32)
    fdx_s = DIRECTIONS[dir_s, 1].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_y_s = jnp.clip(ay_s + fdy_s, 0.0, jnp.float32(H - 1))
    front_x_s = jnp.clip(ax_s + fdx_s, 0.0, jnp.float32(W - 1))

    # === PHASE 1: Not holding pyramid → approach pyramid ===
    dist_ap_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - pyr_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - pyr_x_s)
    dist_ap_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - pyr_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - pyr_x_n)
    not_holding_both = (1.0 - hs) * (1.0 - hn)
    r_approach_pyr = not_holding_both * (dist_ap_s - dist_ap_n) / max_dist * 3.0

    # === PICKUP BONUS ===
    r_pickup = just_picked.astype(jnp.float32) * 2.0

    # === PHASE 2: Holding → navigate so front cell is adjacent to square ===
    # The key insight: putdown places pyramid in front cell.
    # So we want front cell to be adjacent (dist=1) to square.
    # Reward: reduce distance from front cell to square while holding.
    dist_front_sq_s = jnp.abs(front_y_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(front_x_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_front_sq_n = jnp.abs(front_y_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(front_x_n - sq_x_n)

    holding_both = hs * hn
    # Approach square via agent position
    dist_as_s = jnp.abs(ay_s - sq_y_s) + jnp.abs(ax_s - sq_x_s)
    dist_as_n = jnp.abs(ay_n - sq_y_n) + jnp.abs(ax_n - sq_x_n)
    r_approach_sq = holding_both * (dist_as_s - dist_as_n) / max_dist * 3.0

    # Reward front cell being adjacent to square while holding
    # This is the ideal position for putdown
    front_adj_to_sq = holding_n & (dist_front_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_front_sq_n <= 1.5)
    r_front_adj = front_adj_to_sq.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0

    # Progress: front cell getting closer to square while holding
    r_front_progress = holding_both * (dist_front_sq_s - dist_front_sq_n) / max_dist * 2.0

    # === PUTDOWN REWARD ===
    placed_adj = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 1.5)
    placed_near = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 1.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_n <= 3.5)
    placed_far = just_placed & pyr_on_grid_n & (dist_pyr_sq_n > 3.5)
    r_putdown = (
        placed_adj.astype(jnp.float32) * 15.0
        + placed_near.astype(jnp.float32) * 1.0
        + placed_far.astype(jnp.float32) * (-2.0)
    )

    # === SUCCESS REWARD ===
    r_success = success.astype(jnp.float32) * 30.0

    # === PERSISTENT SUCCESS ===
    was_success = (pyr_cnt_s > 0.5) & (~holding_s) & (dist_pyr_sq_s >= 0.5) & (dist_pyr_sq_s <= 1.5)
    r_persist = (was_success & success).astype(jnp.float32) * 5.0

    # === SMALL TIME PENALTY ===
    r_time = jnp.float32(-0.01)

    total = (
        r_approach_pyr
        + r_pickup
        + r_approach_sq
        + r_front_adj
        + r_front_progress
        + r_putdown
        + r_success
        + r_persist
        + r_time
    )

    return total.astype(jnp.float32)
